earlier.headline: Ray Dalio Warns of Debt Cycle Leading to Political Extremism

earlier.headline: Webb's Stunning View of Saturn's Atmosphere
earlier.body: Webb teamed up with Hubble, observing the ringed planet in complementary wavelengths of light to give us a richer, more layered understanding of its atmosphere.

earlier.headline: Mass US Bee Die-Off Amid Lab Closure Plans
earlier.body: Despite suddenly losing 1.6 million bee colonies to a mass die off in the U.S. in a year, Trump WH is instead planning to close the USDA’s premier bee 🐝laboratory.

earlier.headline: Be Humble: Universe Bigger Than Your View
earlier.body: Be humble. Be teachable. The universe is bigger than your view of the universe. There's always room for a new idea.

earlier.headline: Webb Captures New Image of Galaxy Messier 58
earlier.body: Webb captured this new image of galaxy Messier 58, in both the near and mid-infrared, as part of a treasury of 55 massive, star-forming galaxies.
